From the very beginning, Mike (the owner) went out of his way to ensure I felt confident in both the company and the product choices. When I was still deciding which contractor to go with and which shingle color would suit my home best (since small samples don’t always reflect how a full roof will look), Mike provided addresses of past projects so I could see the colors installed on actual homes. This made a huge difference in choosing the perfect look for my roof. We went with MaxDef Granite Gray.

The crew was outstanding. They were respectful, professional, and took great care both in the installation and in cleaning up the property afterwards. Everything was done with attention to detail, and it shows in the final result.

After the job was complete, I raised a concern about the wall flashing color not blending well with the new shingles. Mike personally came out to my home, immediately agreed it didn’t look right, and on the spot painted the flashing so everything looked clean and uniform. That level of responsiveness and commitment to customer satisfaction is rare — and deeply appreciated.

All of my dealings with Mike and his team have been positive. They stand behind their work, deliver excellent quality, and truly care about their customers. I would recommend Busy Boys Roofing to anyone looking for a reliable, trustworthy roofing company.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDJFpUVy_qYQq5z6CdZbM1d&fid=0x0:0x593cb3c2a24977ac"],"When":"2025-9-12"},{"Name":"Shawn Bremner","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJoFJqkGrnTNdaoqJOsGzYbImiHfZz5i6Hjnc_Eb3k9G0nl5Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A big shout out to Mike of Busy Boy Roofing for the exceptional service on our replacement roof. They were also so supportive of my daycare and the outside grounds kept safe and clean at all times. I would give a reference any time for this roofing company as our home looks stunning!
Mike also came back and spent the time making sure my sky lights were clean and streak free. The installers were very punctual and came every day until they were done. They were also very professional and considerate...
careful with our garden areas and cleaning up each day..

He told me he was very happy with the work and the only problem he had was chasing Michael down to pay him. This individual also mentioned that Spartan had replaced a roof across the street and that the work had originally been contracted to Penfolds but that they had subcontracted the work to Spartan. I had also been talking to Penfolds but their quote was roughly 50% higher than Spartan's for the roof portion alone. Spartan was clearly the best choice.

I decided to go with the Landmark PRO shingles and I am glad I did. They are a heavier shingle as evidenced by the difficulty in cutting them. I was impressed with the work ethic of the crew. It was difficult to get them to take a break even though it was quite hot.

The main chimney chase was clad in channel cedar and was roughly 25 feet high. The original builder had not flashed the top of the chimney and when Michael pulled the bottom siding off it was clear that the base structure was totally rotted and that all the plywood and siding on two sides had to be replaced. He dove right in, fortified the structure and replaced the plywood and siding and ensured that it had proper flashing so the problem would not happen again. All of this was done by ladder from sloped ground - truly amazing!

I am very happy with the quality of work done and I have no reservation in recommending Michael and Spartan to my friends and family. I feel lucky to have found him.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICJqsjfPw&fid=0x0:0x4aef9a794929fa4f"],"When":"2023-6-24"}]

Highly recommended.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Gordon Guo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWV4uPfP2kQ5DnwL6VTdQvCCQR14o6SeVbc4yKUbduckfuo-x1f-Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"So glad I hired GL Roofing to repair my roof leak, additional spot repairs and moss removal to extend the life of my roof.  Gurpal is such a friendly person, on time, and his team completed the work without delay, at a reasonable price.  Will for sure recommend to family and friends.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"C J nakane","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLyp3KNWtBHzeVZ6QdR8H0sBGeNx-Yf0xc9OGWdkjFhr_lYFQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Mr Gurpal is a very nice guy and easy going so i hired him to repair some rotten fascia boards. He asked me if i wanted to enlarge my gutter downpipe so i agreed to do 2 of them.
His crew came promptly a few days later as promised in the morning but quickly left ? I got a phone call from gurpal 10 min afterwards and he asked for a little more money. I told him i had a cheaper guy waiting so he said ok and went with the agreed quote and came to my house.
They did a very quick  job repairing the fascia boards and enlarging the 2 downpipes.
I had to point out the hole around the downpipe opening which they came back 2 hours later with a cover.
I also had to point out a fascia board that needed some epoxy which they did.
In the end I felt I did not receive all the services we discussed so I felt I overpaid.
Was not a good value for my money.","Images":null,"When":""}]

Although the final product is good, the process was horrible and I can’t recommend them. Communication with Sukh started strong, until the project began and he became less responsive. Numerous problems arose such as the workers causing 4 cracks in our ceilings and punching two holes straight through the drywall. This led to subcontractors to repair the damage, and they were ill equipped, not even using drop sheets or cleaning up their mess. All sorts of debris was left by the crew who then challenged us on what they would take away to dispose of. What was quoted as a two week job turned into 2 months of frustration and scheduling challenges.

As I said above, we are happy with the final product and the price was good, but based on the execution I can’t say that I would recommend this company to others.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBw-Vv9wGjUO2uSSE1t13IL&fid=0x0:0xefda7f80618afe6b"],"When":"2025-9-21"},{"Name":"Victor Bernard","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKByq2T2RmcheCUR9Utyw7hsM67Jm3Mch-3S7W3-cA4rqVbvw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Marks Roofing did a great job replacing our roof with high quality shingles including the gutters. I definitely recommend Sukhi and his team. They are professional, respectful and thorough. Providing daily updates and keep u in the look during the project.

The final result was great and they provided us with final review and 10 years warranty for the new roof. Definitely will refer family and friends","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Foz Patter","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK-BvFDD3ebMWYqc4uXlKvjmyWEpbY8eCI2VjGGffmki5CvEA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Sukh and his crew (regrettably I don't remember their names) worked hard to complete my torch down roof and skylight replacement. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"M O'Malley","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLE9oryCxUZoWBiAKLQuVzQw-eUYxUkGxhWorAG0c9H50en-w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Accountable Roofing Services recently converted our cedar shake roof to asphalt shingles. From start to finish, Derek oversaw the work in a most professional, knowledgeable and reliable manner.  Derek visited the job site regularly to ensure things were progressing smoothly and communicated regularly with us. Every day, Derek and his crew (Dan, Heidi, Ed) left the job site clean and tidy that even the neighbours commented to us as to how neat things were left during the roofing process. Never have we had someone so meticulous with work and attention to detail including inspection and corrective action to ensure quality. Derek and his crew are top notch professionals that I can highly recommend.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Leah Durec","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJizfGw4EE0Wq5oeqzsM9RsFnkSBJmciaDhC8l4_JnYCmic_A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"So impressed with our roof and gutter repair today, we had a leak and Derek, the owner of Accountable Roofing, was able to come out the same day to find the source of the leak and even repaired same day.  Great price and very professional service.  Will definitely recommend and call him again if any other problems arise.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Robert Ross","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWwy9fJ1vFTERMIkkfwEzH7p87ae4iiTfDCgw_wXXM5hOk6eeBm=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Accountable Roofing is a fantastic company to do business with.  The owner, Derek Moyes, is an upstanding kind of guy.  He truly cares about looking after his customers.   This is a rare attribute in today’s world.

The workmanship on the installation was top notch.  His attention to detail is excellent.

If you are thinking about getting a new roof, I highly recommend Accountable Roofing.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"George Shimizu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJHBRn77rk6C1M016AqXBE8LYnUx79j0nXsGcAHBtz_qHxTHA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"If you are looking for a roofer, you cannot find a finer one than Derek Moyes of Accountable Roofing Services Ltd. Our original cedar shake roof was 30 years old and we had a leak from the kitchen skylight. I did a lot of research on Homestars and made a list of a number of roofing companies, including Accountable Roofing Services Ltd. I was impressed by the high praise that Derek received from his satisfied customers. There was one review in particular that caught my eye where a senior had noticed Derek's crew working on a house down the street from his home. The senior had a minor repair that he needed done on his roof so he walked down to Derek's job site and told him about it. Derek accompanied the senior back to his home and did the repair right then and there while his crew continued working on the other house. If I recall correctly, the cost of the repair was $160. He was busy with a job, but he made the time to help out the senior in need. This told me a lot about his character.

For that reason, I called Derek first and asked him for a quotation on the cost of repair, if possible, and the cost of replacement with asphalt shingle. I also asked him to look at the 6 skylights and the kitchen skylight in particular since it was leaking. He provided us with quotations to replace the 6 skylights and to repair the cedar shake roof as well as a quotation for a totally new asphalt shingle roof, including 6 new skylights. What impressed me was his honesty in providing me with a repair quotation which was a fraction of the cost of a new roof. In the end, my wife and I opted for a new roof with GAF HD shingles and 6 new skylights.

The work on the new roof with GAF HD shingles including installation of 6 new skylights was started on August 5 and completed in 4 working days. Derek is a very detail oriented person and kept us informed throughout the process. He took many pictures and it was obvious from looking at them that he was meticulous in making sure that he did a perfect job. We have a lot of flowerbeds, small trees and bushes in our garden around our home and Derek made sure that everything was properly covered and protected. Derek was there every day not only supervising by doing some of the work himself. He was the last person to leave every day. After the crew did a once over on our lawn to pick up nails and debris, Derek went over it again in detailed fashion to make sure that everything was picked up. He and his crew always tidied all of their equipment and supplies at the end of each day so that our property was not left looking like a construction site.

Rick","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Derek Smith","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLLCXQpjAY6F_bvavp4eiOLe0Nl3ZAOU2pH7hvJuFJEHgoV8g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Had a leak in the roof that showed up during an atmospheric river.

I feel confident that the leak won't return.  I went up on the roof a couple of weeks post repair and it looks great; he even spray-painted the flashing to complement the roof colour. In addition, the cost was reasonable.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Christer Hulten","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKKRdbnOXuae7IV__c2A4forwXeSs4LcMLiK1tQV0xqE8Nkdv4=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Arnold and sons did the reroofing on our house with torch on roofing with added insulation.
They confirmed a warranty of 25 years.
Large an small bubbles developed after a few years and was repaired twice.
More bubbles developed 2023 and was promised to be repaired by Ken Arnold, the owner.
Now we are in 2024 and yet more bubbles has developed in different spots over the whole roof.
We have called their office a number of times in the past month and been promised a return call from  Ken Arnold by their office, even after having called his mobil, still no sign of returned calls.

I assume we have to call in a new Roofing Contractor to do re-roofing and forward the cost of work to Arnold and Sons roofing Co.
Presently I would be hesitant to recommend this Company Arnold and Sons roofing Co. to do any work on your house.
If I had known how they treat their customer after their work is done, I might have hired a different Contractor.

He told us he would do the work on the next dry day (Tuesday), and we confirmed the date with him multiple times via call and text to make sure someone would be home.
I took a day off work and woke up early, as he said the crew would arrive first thing in the morning and the job would take two days. But no one came. After waiting two hours, my husband started calling, and every call went straight to voicemail. The owner never called or texted back to explain why they didn’t show up.
We ended up suffering through another two weeks of rain and constant leaking because we were depending on them. We were already a bit skeptical after reading some other reviews, but we trusted the owner because we understand things can happen.
He may do good work, but this company is certainly not reliable. If they can’t show up before the work even starts, it’s hard to imagine what their after-sale service would be like. Then we saw the Rai Roofing crew working nearby and gave them a call. The general manager, Ravi was very professional from the get go. Within hours we had a good  quote, based on satellite dimension imagery. It included safety protocols, insurance and warranty info.  The next day Ravi came to the house. He examined the roof and interior roof framing from the attic side as well.  Our house is old, and the shiplap was pronounced strong and sound.

Within the week,  the Rai Roofing team arrived at 8:15am in the morning with a 7 man seasoned professional crew and all materials. The old roof was taken off, and a new one installed with fresh vents, and flashing. By 3:30pm the job was done, the site was clean, and the team headed back to the ferry, to return to the mainland.

We are very impressed with this company. Professional service, responsive, and they do what they say they are going to do, when they say the are going to do it. Great communications!  This is a family business and the team has many years of experience. They worked together like a well oiled machine,

We are located on the Sunshine Coast. It is often difficult to get contractors here. We were very impressed by Rai Roofing. The price was competitive and the work top-notch. We highly recommend Rai Roofing Ltd.

Kirk and Diana

Thanks for the peace of mind Carl,  Eileen","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Hilary Douglas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLv9j3jJ4PDt-gdiaP_YlVj7ZVDQkgXMemJCzc1ChAK1kKFCQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Carl is SO knowledgeable, SO helpful, and so easy to work with, I can not recommend him enough!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Datis Mohsenipour","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWuxlBnW10Q6mk0rqzTHKRt6GrLkBVUv-QmvgxP0B7HPx_r-9kR=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"TLDR: If you need a roofing inspector, hire Carl Inkman. (detailed experience below)

I hired a roofing company to do a torch-over job on my existing roof. Unfortunately, the job was done horrendously.

Based on my research, I was able to identify a ton of issues which I flagged. After back and forths with the company, and constant denial of poor workmanship - I asked them to halt the work. I contacted two roofing companies to determine if the roof was salvageable or not, and when I passed on their confirmation of all the issues, the contractors I hired continued to act as if the job was done appropriately. Eventually, they came back to discuss my issues which led to them suggesting I hire an inspector and that they would fix any deficiencies if they came up.

I hired Carl based on his experience, credentials, and the level of detail and clarity he provided in our communications prior to booking the inspection. I was not disappointed.

Not only did he provide a thorough report, but he also gave me tips on how to protect myself against the company putting a lien against my house in the event of me terminating the contract due to material breach.

After the inspection, he responded to communications from the roofing company.

Now that I'm in the process of hiring a new roofing company, he's made himself available to answer my questions about the company I'm looking to potentially hire.

This an entire experience has been a nightmare, but Carl has been a silver lining for me. I'm very grateful that I hired him... man, is this guy ever an expert in his craft.

I truly can't thank him and recommend him enough...","Images":null,"When":""}]

Here’s why:

- The owner, John, is honest, compassionate, and takes real pride in the quality of his workmanship.

- He treats his team with respect, and you can see that motivation reflected in the great work they do.

- Before giving a quote, John personally inspects your roof—unlike salespeople who rely only on satellite images and miss important details.

- His pricing is fair, and he uses top-quality shingles, underlay, and materials.

- He doesn’t cut corners—he replaces all old metal instead of re-using it.

- He even adds extra roof vents (without you having to ask), showing his commitment to doing the job right.

- Communication is excellent—you get daily updates with photos so you always know what’s happening.

- Cleanup is thorough and leaves no mess behind.

- Best of all, the warranty is transferable to a future homeowner if you ever sell your house.

I learned the hard way that not all roofers are the same. A couple of years ago, I used a large roofing company, Penxxxxx, and was completely disappointed. When I reported issues afterward, the salesman who sold me the job passed me off to the repair department and never spoke to me again (and the repairs were not done up to standard).  With JMT Roofing, the experience was the exact opposite—personal, professional, and trustworthy from start to finish.

Did I not say it all here? open_hours: {"Friday":["8 a.m.–6 p.m."],"Monday":["8 a.m.–6 p.m."],"Saturday":["8 a.m.–6 p.m."],"Sunday":["8 a.m.–6 p.m."],"Thursday":["8 a.m.–6 p.m."],"Tuesday":["8 a.m.–6 p.m."],"Wednesday":["8 a.m.–6 p.m."]}

[{"Name":"Tom Spicker","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIaqcifnfHx50_4JB4UAKA0wo5vuunStHGhahlp15xnNXFWpw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My wife and I had our house roof replaced early March 2026. We received several quotes and decided to use 21st Century Roofers.

Darryl completed a comprehensive site review, provided pictures of potentially challenging areas of our roof as well as provided several solutions.

In the end we were provided a competitive price for good, better and best roofing options.

The 21st Century Roofing team was amazing. They tarped our house and surrounding areas to protect it from roof debris. Every evening the entire job site was cleaned and a magnetic roller was used to insure no roofing nails were left on the ground. Job site safety was a priority. The job was finished on time and to the price quoted.

The entire team was professional and polite.

I would not hesitate to recommend 21st Century Roofers to any perspective clients needing a new roof and/or a repair.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Bernadette Arcand","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXlqA87h9JI6g4BmVgyI78p_t7d_t5qK-7NNZi5KSUo7lKBdOyQQQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"After extensive research on roofing products and requesting several quotes from roofers in my area, we selected 21st Century Roofing, for a number of factors, which I will discuss in my review.

The timely and responsive communication from Darryl was evident from the beginning. He took every care and attention to understand our roofing needs, providing insight to help us make the best informed decision. I was able to purchase the roofing product that I desired at a more reasonable rate than competition, and with Darryl's expertise, we were able to increase visual appeal on our home ridges, plus improve venting performance with ridge venting without a huge added cost; something we had not considered even through our research.

What is more, we had a very difficult time sourcing a skilled trade/carpenter/framer who could assist us with some non-structural roof modifications prior to the roof installation. This was delaying our ability to start the project.
Darryl had someone who was skilled, willing, and able to start the work at our home when we were ready! Within a matter days, modifications were done, roofers were on site for 3 days, Darryl took care of the debris with his pinkbins service, excellent custom flashing was like icing on a cake, and everything was done before I knew it.

The quality of the work is apparent. Darryl and I walked the roof for an overall inspection and it was an impressive sight. Overall I am incredibly grateful for Darryl's oversight and support on my home project, which moved the needle on a great deal of work that had to be done. There is nothing easy about needing a new roof, and one of the larger homeowner expenses, but having a trusting partnership with a roofing contractor, with all the work done with care, attention and quality top of mind, speaks volumes of 21st Century Roofing.

If you are on the fence, or roof, about which roofing company to select, you will not be disappointed choosing 21st Century Roofing.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID2uPPSfA&fid=0x0:0x51982575b8ab8d11"],"When":"2022-5-6"},{"Name":"Rachelle Hankey (Pruneau)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLg3wkiWInZmfDJa4RkZpbxcos8Y-RJp-D351fc8W_PPmarSiws=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Thank you, thank you, thank you to Darryl & the roofing repair team who came here on a drop of a dime! Lol, or due to a concerned phone call! Initially, our day started with Mike from MLP Heating. He was here to put in 2 new bathroom fans plus some. While in the attic, he noticed damage to the roof with water, making it thru our roof to our insulation. Turns out the 2 plumbing stack bases where shattered, leaving openings that needed attention ASAP! Thank goodness we needed new fans & were introduced to Mike!
So, again, many thanks to " 21st Century Roofers Ltd" Crew who rushed, no speeding :) from South Surrey all the way to Mission! Every effort is greatly appreciated of them & Darryl's organization of the task!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDv_t27rgE&fid=0x0:0x51982575b8ab8d11"],"When":"2024-12-21"},{"Name":"Pat Moore","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJBXTVFGRnj-d11iFaGfiXwirbCnbJarfOtbnBVj4gIiwXQcA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had an exceptional experience with 21st Century Roofers. Darryl was very professional and the crew did a great job. I was impressed with the job that was done and the cleanup was very thorough. Darryl even came back and replaced a gutter outlet at no charge. I highly recommended them.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"David Yuan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKPptb1bVTUMGJx_gNyRT_oGNAeDEhBMdVhcq_6-vZKbDbq8v6V=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We researched several companies and found Darryl was professional, attentive, punctual and easy to work with. We are happy with the finished product Darryl and his team delivered and would highly recommend 21 Century based on our experience with them.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"noni goertzen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUPpaF41FMoGgA-oRohUTM-PtGnG2-Qi8WMWhRRpomi0BbtxH_F=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Scott and Chris were a fantastic team who worked in an absolute downpour to find the leak in my roof. Balbir was very honest and said our roof was still in good condition.  He had found some nails that had popped up and repaired. He had taken pics to show us. We highly recommend him.\nThanks Balbir","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Anthony Leung","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLR1vGhHoK2KLeCkTftFijzyXENnUBiKxQiSf4pJKMoOOPe-Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Installed a roof without putting proper plywood overtop an existing shiplap contrary to BC roofing association guidelines. Nails were also plain roofing nails and were not 2” spiral. During hot / cold contraction expansion seasons, it will cause the nail to back out. The lack of a proper  3/4” plywood underlay installation overtop of the shiplap will void the warranty of the shingles as there isn’t a proper foundation for the nails to bite into if the existing shiplap is cracked or damaged. By the time the elderly homeowner was made aware, it was too late and done without proper notification or discussion with the elderly homeowner that they won’t be installing the plywood sheathing. Recommending any homeowner to do their due diligence and ask what type of materials they will use and the method they will be installing the roof. After discovering the improper installation technique, the company only offered a 15 year warranty which is rather on the low life expectancy of a newly shingled roof.  Upon completion,  the homeowner thought there was a couple shingles missing and when they contacted the roofing company owner to discuss the missing ridge vent shingles, he came over right away and was diligent and responsible enough to come over and to explain that they ran out of materials and were going to come install it the following next day. Upgrading the review to 2.5 stars as the roofing owner was responsive and was communicative at the end.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ashleigh Patterson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL1pCmFi94vvuapZMKa2F6hBX9JYkXiEiYwOH00lzgFwW7WLg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"P B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK0f4Kil1V-rOJQv676t4WTavWviLk295GmBkhnhn77R6bb_g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"","Images":null,"When":""}]
